message:
fix(embed): thread Cx through download and API embedding pipelines

asupersync 0.2.9 added a required &Cx parameter to
HttpClient::request_streaming for cancellation support. This caused
compile errors in model_download.rs and api_embedder.rs.

Changes:
- model_download: thread cx through download_model →
  download_file_with_retry → download_single_file → request_streaming
- api_embedder: thread cx through embed → request_batch →
  request_streaming; also fix bare .unwrap() on mutex to use
  .unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) matching rest of codebase
- auto_detect: pass cx to download_model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
